name: o11ytsdb
description: Browser-native time-series database for OpenTelemetry data.

scripts.build:rust: cd rust && cargo build --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && cp target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/o11ytsdb_wasm.wasm ../wasm/o11ytsdb-rust.wasm
scripts.build:all: npm run build:wasm && npm run build
scripts.bench: npm run build && npm run bench:build && node bench/run.mjs
scripts.bench:rowgroup-layout: npm run build && npm run bench:build && node --expose-gc bench/dist/rowgroup-layout.bench.js
scripts.bench:chunk-size-sweep: npm run build && npm run bench:build && node bench/dist/chunk-size-sweep.js
scripts.bench:rowgroup-memory-audit: npm run build && npm run bench:build && node bench/dist/rowgroup-memory-audit.js
scripts.bench:rowgroup-profile: npm run build && npm run bench:build && node --expose-gc bench/dist/rowgroup-profile.js
scripts.bench:tiered-rowgroup: npm run build && npm run bench:build && node bench/dist/tiered-rowgroup-compare.js
